meaning: n.希伯来的先知,何西阿书
examples: Hosea once said, "Oh, that we might know the Lord!"
God told Hosea to find a wife, and told him ahead of time that she would be unfaithful to him.
Among the earliest of these prophets is Hosea, who is thought to have written in the 8th century B.C.E..
Hosea Gear, twice, and Mils Muliaina also crossed for New Zealand, with Lee Byrne getting a late Wales try.
Hosea Gear and Mils Muliaina scored twice, while Dan Carter, Conrad Smith and Andy Ellis also crossed the line.
